expectations.text: Exactly 8 walls are defined (T-shape uses 8 per the skill's wall count table)
All coordinates are in inches (40 ft = 480 in, 20 ft = 240 in, 24 ft = 288 in, 5.5 in depth)
Corner overlap extensions accounted for: sheathing/drywall extensions offset by wall depth (5.5 in) at shared corners
expectations.evidence: y=234.5 and start offsets consistent with 5.5in corner overlap

expectations.text: ext_dir values are correctly assigned (+1 or -1) based on which side of each wall faces the exterior
expectations.evidence: ext_dir values match exterior-facing directions for each wall

expectations.text: Dormer cut range calculated from center of top bar (240 in from left) ± half dormer width, with affected truss indices identified
expectations.evidence: Center=240in, 72in dormer → 204–276in range, trusses at 216, 240, 264 identified

expectations.text: T-junction walls (where stem meets top bar) correctly handled — interior/exterior flags set appropriately
expectations.evidence: Note mentions T-junction coordinate alignment but doesn't specify that the rear-facing top-bar walls (3,4) and stem walls (6,7) need explicit sheathing extension treatment at the junction
